data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, AI Chip Giant Broadcom Jumps After Stock Market Rallies
data.description: On Wednesday, the stock market saw a strong rally despite major indexes remaining below their 50-day moving averages. Late earnings report from Broadcom surpassed expectations. Following the rally, Dow Jones Futures witnessed a decline, while the AI chip giant Broadcom experienced a significant jump in its stock value. The post highlights the fluctuating market trends and the notable performance of Broadcom following the recent stock market rally.
China’s new economic policies push iron ore higher.
China will allow suitable surplus capacity in emerging industries and promote competition and innovation, the state planner says.
China will fast-track the development of industries including intelligent connected NEVs, the state planner says.
China will introduce a “green channel” to speed up the process for listings, mergers, and acquisitions, the state planner says.
According to China’s state planning agency, authorities will facilitate funding for tech firms and offer them innovative financial solutions.
China will push further reforms of state-owned enterprises and state capital to enhance strength, efficiency, and scale, the state planner says.
China will strengthen the use of new policy-backed financial instruments and top up capital for major projects, the state planner says.
China will tighten management of project quality and safety to promote high-standard projects, the state planner says.
China aims to reform and strengthen the local tax system, the Finance Ministry reports.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall: U.S.-Iran Conflict Sparks Market Upheaval As Nvidia Rallies; Credo, MongoDB Plunge Late
data.description: Stock market futures, including the Dow Jones, saw a significant drop due to the beginning of the U.S.-Iran conflict on Monday. Nvidia experienced notable movement in its stock while Credo and MongoDB saw a decline in their stock prices following disappointing earnings reports. The upheaval in the market was fueled by the tensions between the United States and Iran, leading to fluctuations in various stocks.

data.title: Cadonilimab shows 100% 24-month overall survival in complete responders in recurrent/metastatic cervical cancer study.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Akeso, Inc. revealed the updated long-term survival findings from the pivotal Phase II trial in China (COMPASSION-03/AK104-201) of cadonilimab, a monotherapy for patients with recurrent conditions. Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) disclosed this important information.

data.title: Guangxi region in China aims to strengthen trade with ASEAN, key plans for next 5 years include logistics expansion.
data.description: In the upcoming five years, the Guangxi Zhuang autonomous region in southern China aims to enhance trade relations with the Association of Southeast Asian Nations. This initiative will involve the expansion of logistics channels to facilitate increased trade exchanges.
According to Jiji, the UAE Industry Minister told Japanese counterpart Akazawa that Japan ranks high on the UAE’s priority list.

data.title: Certified EO introduces EO Base to address participation gap in employee-owned companies, providing education and engagement space.
data.description: A recent development in Richmond, Virginia introduces a new platform aimed at providing employee-owned companies with a central hub for ownership education and engagement. This initiative aims to enhance the understanding and involvement of employees in their companies' ownership structures. The platform is designed to cater specifically to employee-owned businesses, offering resources and tools to facilitate learning and participation.

data.title: China's Two Sessions underway; article discusses country's sustainable growth model through green innovation.
data.description: In Beijing today, on March 4, 2026, the annual Two Sessions of China have commenced. A recent analysis by CGTN highlights China's progress in achieving high-quality development through green transformation and innovation. The country's model of sustainable growth has attracted attention, showcasing significant advancements in recent years.
